{{Quote|"Ah, home on Kubindi, most beautiful of all worlds. I can almost taste its succulent wroches, its tender termytes! Here, my hive grows the plumpest and tastiest spydrs in the galaxy. Soon we will feast on delicacies you have never imagined!"|Udin speaks of the delicacies of his homeworld.|<ref name="M6" />}}
'''Wroches''' were a food eaten on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]]. The indigenous, [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] considered them to be a particularly succulent delicacy. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], when the Kubaz [[Udin]] returned to [[Gender/Legends|his]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] with a number of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]], wroches were amongst several delicacies he claimed to be looking forward to eating.<ref name="M6" />

==Behind the scenes==
Wroches were first mentioned in [[1998]] in ''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]'', a novel written by [[Dave Wolverton]] as part of the ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' series.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]'' {{1stm}}
